response.justification: Sarah Smith's 15-year background is firmly rooted in web and full-stack development, with no demonstrable experience in the hardware-adjacent disciplines this role demands. While her low-latency DLang work and AI-agent framework exposure show some systems thinking and awareness of the AI space, there is no evidence of SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, DNN training/inference optimization, or hardware-software co-design — which are core, not preferred, requirements for a Principal-level hire in this domain.
strengths: Exposure to AI/agent frameworks and MCP tooling shows awareness of the current AI ecosystem
Low-latency async I/O work in DLang demonstrates some systems-level performance thinking
15+ years of engineering experience suggests strong software fundamentals and project maturity
concerns: Zero hardware background: no SoC, IP modeling, GPU architecture, or SIMD/MIMD experience
No DNN training or inference optimization work — a non-negotiable for deep-learning workload analysis
Web/full-stack seniority does not transfer to cloud infrastructure hardware optimization at the principal level

key_factors.factor: Low-latency systems and AI-adjacent tooling exposure
